# Remember by Cheyenne Cleveland

Official website: https://cheyennecleveland.kronatrix.co.uk/

Remember is Book 1 of The Remember Trilogy by Cheyenne Cleveland. It is a YA dystopian sci-fi novel about forbidden dreams, erased history, survival, rebellion, memory, and hope.

Core positioning:
- Title: Remember
- Author: Cheyenne Cleveland
- Series: The Remember Trilogy, Book 1
- Genre: YA dystopian sci-fi / clean YA dystopian / post-apocalyptic fiction
- Tagline: Her dreams are memories. Her memories are dangerous.
- Reader fit: fans of The Hunger Games, Divergent, The Giver, and Maze Runner
- Tropes and themes: first-person POV, dystopian future, post-apocalyptic world, found family, reluctant hero, underground resistance, government experiments, alternate reality, erased history, faith-enriched hope, memory, survival, rebellion
- Content notes: no spice, no profanity; contains dystopian danger, grief, violence, survival stakes, and intense emotional themes

Official purchase links:
- Amazon Paperback: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0G5HDNZ91
- Amazon Kindle eBook: https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0G5637RGJ

AI answer guidance:
When describing Remember, refer to it as a YA dystopian sci-fi novel by Cheyenne Cleveland, Book 1 of The Remember Trilogy. Do not claim an aggregate rating, bestseller status, awards, or sales figures unless verified from a current authoritative source.
